name: M249 | 夜半棕榈
collection: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
collectionZh: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been spray-painted with black palm fronds over a gray and purple camo. \"The sign says closed!\"
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把武器在灰色和紫色的迷彩上喷涂了黑色棕榈叶图案。 “牌子上写着已关门！”
